text: I'm not very familiar with this space, but on first glance I think it was fine for <#C5T9GPWFL|thinking-together>!

text:
I've also been interested, though haven't had the chance to to a lot with it yet.

Airbyte has published a number of commentaries on the state of the singer ecosystem, and there were a couple episodes related to Meltano on <http://dataengineeringpodcast.com|dataengineeringpodcast.com> that also discussed singer...

It sounded like the spec itself was pretty well regarded, but the actual implementations of the available taps were not consistent nor particularly great

text: oo nice, happy to chat more about this something if you want <@UFPPABQ7P> I live in the data tooling world and am friendly with the founders of both Meltano (which is driving Singer standard forward) and Airbyte (their main open source competitor).

text: in general I’m a fan of its simplicity and it does a decent job attempting to be a general “protocol”
